body.title: CLOSED: Add log_llm_io() and log_state_snapshot() to IgorBase
body.result: Added log_llm_io() and log_state_snapshot() methods to IgorBase with JSON logging to daily files, size caps, and exception handling
body.description:
IgorBase has no method for logging LLM prompt+response pairs or arbitrary state snapshots. pe_chain and COA must reach outside the base class to forensic_logger for these, which breaks the IgorBase-consistent logging pattern established by T-d125-igorbase-drift and T-logging-class-inheritance-fixups.

Add two fire-and-forget methods to IgorBase (wild_igor/igor/igor_base.py):
- log_llm_io(step: str, prompt: str, response: str, model: str, elapsed_ms: float): appends a JSON line to ~/.TheIgors/logs/llm_io/YYYYMMDD.log (daily rotation). Cap prompt at 16KB, response at 8KB.
- log_state_snapshot(label: str, state: dict): appends a JSON line to ~/.TheIgors/logs/snapshots/YYYYMMDD.log (daily rotation). Useful for basket-at-escalation captures.

Both catch all exceptions internally and log failures to self.log.error — never raise from a logging call.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/igor_base.py
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code (update igor_base.py module docstring to name the two new methods), OOP-first (methods on IgorBase, not standalone functions)
**Scope boundary:** Adds two methods to IgorBase only. No callers yet — callers added in T-pe-chain-flight-recorder, T-coa-flight-recorder, T-goal-continuation-igorbase.
**Test plan:** Add unit tests verifying: (1) log_llm_io() writes a parseable JSON line with step/prompt/response/model/elapsed_ms fields to the expected daily path; (2) log_state_snapshot() writes a parseable JSON line with label/state fields; (3) an exception raised inside the method body does NOT propagate to the caller.
